---
title: "Tree families"
toc: true
---


<!-- This file is generated by scripts/generate_tree_list.py. Do not edit this file directly; update the generator or the underlying data sources instead. -->

- [Betulaceae (Birch family)](/trees/family/betulaceae.html) — 4 species
- [Ebenaceae](/trees/family/ebenaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Fagaceae](/trees/family/fagaceae.html) — 4 species
- [Juglandaceae](/trees/family/juglandaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Moraceae](/trees/family/moraceae.html) — 1 species
- [Oleaceae (Olive family)](/trees/family/oleaceae.html) — 2 species
- [Pinaceae (Pine family)](/trees/family/pinaceae.html) — 2 species
- [Rosaceae](/trees/family/rosaceae.html) — 3 species
- [Salicaceae](/trees/family/salicaceae.html) — 1 species
- [Sapindaceae](/trees/family/sapindaceae.html) — 2 species
